data.NEWSSUB: 43Rd Annual General Meeting On Wednesday, August 5, 2026
data.HEADLINE: Please note that the Board of Directors at its meeting held today, viz. May 5, 2026 has approved convening the 43rd Annual General Meeting of the Company on Wednesday, August 5, 2026.

data.NEWSSUB: Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change in Directorate
data.MORE: Please note that the Board of Directors at its meeting held today, viz. May 5, 2026  has subject to the approval of members at the ensuing Annual General meeting of the Company, approved the re-appointment of Dr. Pawan Munjal (DIN: 00004223) as the Executive Chairman for another term of five (5) years with effect from October 1, 2026 and appointment of Director in place of Mr. Suman Kant Munjal (DIN: 00002803) who is retiring by rotation and being eligible has offered himself for re-appointment. Requisite details as required under Regulation 30 are enclosed in Annexure.

data.NEWSSUB: Record Date Intimation For Determining Entitlement Of Members For Final Dividend, If Declared At The 43Rd AGM
data.HEADLINE: Pursuant to Regulation 42 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, the Company has fixed the record date as July 24, 2026, for the purpose of determining entitlement of the members for the final dividend (if declared at the 43rd AGM)

data.NEWSSUB: Corporate Action-Board approves Dividend
data.HEADLINE: The Board of Directors at its meeting held today, viz.  May 5, 2026, has considered and approved final dividend subject to the approval of the members @ 3,750% i.e Rs. 75/- per equity share (face value of Rs. 2/- per share). The payment of dividend will be completed within 30 days of declaration at the ensuing Annual General Meeting.

data.NEWSSUB: Audited Standalone And Consolidated Financial Results For The Quarter And Financial Year Ended March 31, 2026
data.HEADLINE: The Board of Directors at its meeting held today, viz, May 5, 2026, has considered and approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended on March 31, 2026. A copy of duly signed audited financial results along with audit reports and declaration in respect of audit reports with unmodified opinion under Regulation 33 of Listing Regulations, is enclosed. A press release issued in this regard, is also enclosed.

data.NEWSSUB: Update on board meeting
data.MORE:
Hero Motocorp Ltdhas informed BSE that the meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company is scheduled on 05/05/2026 ,inter alia, to consider and approve We write with reference to our earlier intimation dated April 21, 2026, wherein we had informed you that a meeting of the Board of Directors is scheduled to be held on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, inter alia, to consider and approve the audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026.

Pursuant to Regulation 29 and other applicable Regulations of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, we wish to inform you that in the said meeting, the Board of Directors may also consider declaration of final dividend, if any, for the financial year 2025-26.

This is for your information and further dissemination.

data.NEWSSUB: Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
data.MORE: We write with reference to our earlier intimation dated February 5, 2026, wherein we have informed about the decision of the Board of Directors to make an additional investment of Rs. 275 crore (in one or more tranches, through a combination of primary infusion and / or secondary purchase) in Euler Motors Private Limited (''Euler Motors''), an associate Company of Hero MotoCorp Limited (''the Company''). In this regard, we wish to inform that the Company has completed the acquisition of 2,68,219 Series E Cumulative Compulsorily Convertible Preference Shares in Euler Motors, for an aggregate consideration of Rs. 210 crore. Post this acquisition, the Company holds 36.67% shares (on a fully diluted basis).
